meta.title: RVC Voice Conversion
meta.description: Convert voices using RVC local AI

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: Trigger voice conversion via webhook. Set RVC_API_KEY env var to enable authentication. API key via X-API-Key header only (no body fallback).

nodes.name: Validate Input
nodes.notes: SECURITY: Input validation with enhanced path traversal protection, timing-safe API key auth (header only, no body fallback), f0_method allowlist, and pitch range validation. All validations fail hard - no fallback to user input.

nodes.name: RVC Upload Voice
nodes.notes: Upload source audio to RVC. Requires RVC_HOST env var (no fallback).

nodes.name: Validate Upload Path
nodes.notes: Validates upload response path: must be /tmp/<alphanumeric>.<ext>, no traversal. No fallback to user input.

nodes.name: Check Upload Valid
nodes.notes: Branch based on upload path validation

nodes.name: Upload Error Response

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ error: $('Validate Upload Path').item.json.error || 'Upload validation failed' }) }}

nodes.notes: Return HTTP 400 for upload path validation failures

nodes.name: RVC Convert

body.raw: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $('Check Valid').item.json.model || 'default', audio_path: $('Check Upload Valid').item.json.path, pitch: $('Check Valid').item.json.pitch || 0, f0_method: $('Check Valid').item.json.f0_method || 'rmvpe' }) }}

nodes.notes: Convert uploaded voice using RVC model. Uses validated upload path only.

nodes.name: Discord Notification
nodes.notes: Send Discord notification when conversion is done
